tools.name: car-list
tools.description:
Search live car inventory on AutoScout24. This is a STRUCTURED FILTER-BASED search, NOT a semantic/open-ended search. It does NOT understand abstract concepts like "family car", "sporty", "reliable", or "good for commuting". You MUST specify concrete vehicle attributes.

IMPORTANT: Always try to include a make and model (e.g., "BMW 3 Series", "Toyota Camry"; just make is also fine) unless the user explicitly wants to browse multiple brands. You can also specify generation (e.g., "BMW 3 Series G20") or variant (e.g., "BMW 320i").

Supported filters:
- Make and model (required unless browsing all brands)
- Price range (e.g., "under 30k", "between 20k and 40k")
- Year/registration (e.g., "from 2020", "2018-2022")
- Mileage (e.g., "under 50k km")
- Fuel type: Gasoline, Diesel, Electric, Hybrid
- Transmission: Automatic, Manual
- Body type: SUV, Sedan, Coupe, Hatchback, Wagon, Convertible, Van
- Color (e.g., "black", "white", "red")
- Location: city name or postal code (defaults to Munich 80331 with 100km radius if not specified)

IMPORTANT: Only a single make-model combination is supported per query. Do NOT include multiple makes or models in a single search query.

If user asks for something abstract, make an educated guess on what make and model would suit them best and add those to the query.
